title: Dragon's Blood
description: Extract the essence from mobs and gain their abilities
body:
Dragon’s Blood is a Minecraft mod that lets you harvest the mystical essence of powerful creatures and brew it into potions that grant their unique abilities. Extract the shadowy teleportation of the Enderman, the explosive force of the Creeper, the brute endurance of the Cow, and the fiery might of the Dragon itself. Each essence unlocks new ways to explore, fight, and survive, blending alchemy with the raw power of mobs. Master the art of essence brewing and become something more than mortal — with Dragon’s Blood, power is yours to drink.

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)

To Do:

- Add  more mob abilities
- Add splash potions and tipped arrows

![bar](https://i.imgur.com/sQrJK7P.png)



The initial Idea for this mod came from a comission from a member of my discord, make sure to check out my  website for my links to possibly have your mod made
